THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PENA, OSCAR UNDERWOOD, IRENE AKA IRENE PENA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1541 TREAT AVENUE SAN FRANCISCO, CA., STAYED UNTIL APR-17-1997, LEASE FORFEITED, DEFT. IRENE PENA TO DELIVER KEYS TO ROHNDA HUFFMAN ON OR BEF ORE 5:00 P.M. ON 4/17/97. PLTF. RETAINS $825.00 SEC DEP AND DEFT. WAIVES ACCOUNTING OF SAME. OSCAR PENA NOT TO OCCUPY PR EMISE OR VISIT AFTER 3/18/97. NO HARASSMENT OR VERBAL ABUSE. IRENE WAIVES FURTHER STAYS.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PENA, OSCAR UNDERWOOD, IRENE AKA IRENE PENA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1541 TREAT AVENUE SAN FRANCISCO, CA., STAYED UNTIL APR-17-1997, LEASE FORFEITED, DEFT. OSCAR PENA NOT TO OCCUPY PR EMISE OR VISIT AFTER 3/18/97. NO HARASSMENT OR VERBAL ABUSE. IRENE WAIVES FURTHER STAYS.
